# AI Furniture & Home Product Hub - MCP Server

> Millimeter-precision furniture, home appliances, gadgets, beauty devices & smart home data for AI agents.
> 300 curated products, 31 categories, 80+ brands, 13 tools.
> Related-item chains: every product links to accessories, protection materials, consumables, and add-ons.
> Operated by ONE, Inc. (Japan)

## What This Server Does

This MCP server provides structured, machine-optimized product data across home, tech, and lifestyle categories.
AI agents can search by exact dimensions (mm), price, color, and category,
then receive affiliate-linked purchase URLs ready to present to end users.

**Key differentiator: Related-Item Chains.**
Every product links to required accessories, protection materials, and recommended add-ons.
Example: Air purifier -> replacement HEPA filter (required) + caster stand + humidity monitor.
This means 1 product lookup naturally leads to 3-5 additional product views.

Beyond simple search, this server uniquely offers:
- **Shelf + storage coordination** with quantity calculations
- **Space-based product discovery** (give dimensions, get everything that fits)
- **Product identification** from visual features (photo -> model number -> specs)
- **Related-item chains** (product -> required accessories -> protection -> add-ons)
- **Category browsing** (31 categories from furniture to smart home to beauty devices)
- **Popular product ranking** with Rakuten trending data

## Why Use This Server

- **1mm precision**: All dimensions in millimeters — outer AND inner
- **Cinderella-fit logic**: Find products that exactly fit a given space
- **Related-item chains**: "You'll also need..." with required vs recommended items
- **Set proposals**: Shelf + storage boxes + protection = complete solution
- **Product identification**: Visual features -> model number, inner dimensions, compatible storage
- **Live pricing**: Rakuten Ichiba API for real-time price & availability
- **Affiliate-ready**: Every product includes an affiliate_url
- **Scene intelligence**: Room-specific storage and product tips
- **31 categories**: Furniture, home appliances, PC peripherals, smart home, beauty devices, kitchen gadgets, health & fitness

## Available Tools (13 tools)

### search_products
Search 300 curated products by dimensions, price, color, and category across 31 categories.

### get_product_detail
Full specifications by product ID. Includes `related_items_hint` showing required accessories and recommended add-ons.

### search_rakuten_products
Real-time search across 200,000+ Rakuten Ichiba listings with affiliate URLs.

### search_amazon_products
Amazon search URL generation with affiliate tags. SearchIndex auto-selected by product category.

### coordinate_storage
Shelf + storage box set proposals with quantity per tier calculations.

### suggest_by_space
Space dimensions (mm) -> all fitting products, grouped by category.

### identify_product
Visual features -> product candidates with confidence scores, specs, and related items.

### compare_products
Side-by-side comparison of 2-5 products.

### find_replacement
Discontinued models -> successor/alternative lookup.

### calc_room_layout
Floor-plan rectangle packing simulation.

### list_categories
Browse all 31 product categories with product counts and sample products.

### get_popular_products
Popular/recommended products by category or brand, with Rakuten trending data.

### get_related_items
**Core tool for view multiplication.**
Given a product ID or keyword, returns the full related-item chain:
- **required**: Must-have items (e.g., HEPA filters for air purifiers, USB-C cables for chargers)
- **protects_with**: Protection materials (floor mats, earthquake gel, heat mats, cases)
- **enhances_with**: Upgrades (casters, extra shelves, monitor arms, attachments)
- **coordinates_with**: Complementary items (cable trays, stands, matching accessories)
- **fits_inside**: Storage that fits inside (inner boxes, wire baskets)

Each related item comes with Rakuten search results and affiliate URLs.
Use `depth=2` to get "related items of related items" for deeper chains.

## Product Categories (31)

| Category | Examples |
|----------|----------|
| シェルフ・棚 | Open shelves, unit shelves |
| カラーボックス | Nitori N-Click, IKEA KALLAX |
| 収納ケース | Storage boxes, Nitori N-InBox, Daiso stacking boxes |
| 衣装ケース | Tenma Fits, clothing storage |
| スチールラック | Steel/metal racks, Luminous |
| デスク | PC desks, standing desks, FlexiSpot E7 |
| キッチン収納 | Kitchen wagons, range racks, tower series |
| ランドリー収納 | Laundry racks, baskets, slim chests |
| バス・洗面収納 | Bath racks, tower corner racks |
| 玄関収納 | Shoe racks, shoe cabinets, umbrella stands |
| テレビ台 | TV stands, IKEA BESTÅ, media consoles |
| 本棚 | Bookshelves, rotating racks, IKEA HEMNES |
| クローゼット収納 | PAX wardrobes, SKUBB organizers, soft boxes |
| ファイル収納 | Muji PP file boxes, Seria Just it |
| ベビー・安全対策 | Baby gates, corner guards |
| 突っ張り棒・つっぱり | Tension rods, tension shelves |
| 保護・補修材 | Wall pads, floor mats, earthquake gel, anti-slip sheets |
| パーツ・アクセサリ | Casters, extra shelves, monitor arms, cable trays, hooks |
| ワゴン・可動収納 | IKEA RÅSKOG, tower wagons, Nitori trolleys |
| ダイニング家具 | Dining tables, chairs, benches |
| ソファ・チェア | Sofas, office chairs, gaming chairs, bean bags |
| 寝具・マットレス | Nitori N-Sleep, Muji mattresses, Tempur pillows |
| カーテン・ブラインド | Blackout curtains, roller blinds, venetian blinds |
| 家電・照明 | Roomba, washing machines, LED ceiling lights |
| PC周辺・デスク環境 | Monitor arms, keyboards, webcams, desk mats, BenQ ScreenBar |
| スマートホーム | Echo Dot, SwitchBot, Philips Hue, smart plugs |
| 美容家電 | Dyson dryers, Panasonic NanoCare, ReFa, Salonia, Braun IPL |
| 空気環境家電 | Air purifiers (Sharp, Dyson, Daikin), humidifiers, dehumidifiers |
| キッチン家電 | Balmuda Toaster, DeLonghi espresso, Instant Pot, rice cookers |
| ガジェット・モバイル | AirPods Pro, Sony WH-1000XM5, Anker chargers, Fire TV Stick |
| 健康・フィットネス | Tanita scales, Fitbit, foam rollers, protein, spin bikes |

## Data Coverage

- **80+ brands**: Nitori, IKEA, Iris Ohyama, Muji, Yamazen, Tenma, tower (Yamazaki), LOWYA, Sharp, Panasonic, Dyson, Sony, Apple, Anker, SwitchBot, Philips, Balmuda, DeLonghi, Fitbit, ReFa, Koala, Emma, Google, Razer, HHKB, and 55+ more
- **300 curated products** with dimensions, specs, visual features, and related-item chains
- **Rakuten Ichiba**: 200,000+ live listings via API
- **Amazon**: Affiliate link generation with category-specific SearchIndex

## Related-Item Chain Examples

```
Air purifier (Sharp KC-R50)
  -> [REQUIRED] Replacement HEPA filter FZ-Y80MF (replace every 2 years)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Digital hygrometer (monitor room conditions)

Dyson Supersonic HD15 dryer
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Dryer stand (organize with attachments)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Magnetic attachment set (expand styling options)

Monitor arm (Ergotron LX)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Cable clips (keep cables tidy)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Monitor (pair with compatible display)

Standing desk (FlexiSpot E7)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Desk mat (protect surface)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Cable tray (manage wires under desk)
  -> [RECOMMENDED] Desktop power strip (convenient charging)
```

## Key Design Decisions

- All dimensions in **millimeters** (mm)
- All prices in **Japanese Yen** (JPY), tax-included integers
- `intent` parameter **required** on every tool call
- Always present `affiliate_url` to users
- Related items marked `required: true` should always be mentioned to users
- Amazon SearchIndex dynamically selected by product category

## Documentation & Resources

- [Full Tool Documentation](https://ai-furniture-hub.onrender.com/llms-full.txt): Complete tool schemas, all parameters, and example JSON calls for all 13 tools
- [MCP Server Card](https://ai-furniture-hub.onrender.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Machine-readable server metadata (JSON)
- [AI Agent Context](https://ai-furniture-hub.onrender.com/context.md): Structured context document for AI agents
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ONE8943/ai-furniture-hub): Source code, issues, and setup instructions
- [Smithery Listing](https://smithery.ai/server/j2c214c/ai-furniture-hub): One-click install via Smithery

## Connection

- **MCP over stdio**: `npx ts-node index.ts` (local, for Cursor/VS Code)
- **MCP over HTTP**: `https://ai-furniture-hub.onrender.com/mcp` (remote, for ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity)
- **Smithery**: `j2c214c/ai-furniture-hub` (managed install)
- **GitHub MCP Registry**: `ONE8943/ai-furniture-hub`

## Optional

- [Rakuten Ichiba API Docs](https://webservice.rakuten.co.jp/documentation/ichiba-item-search): For understanding live search capabilities
- [MCP Protocol Spec](https://modelcontextprotocol.io): Model Context Protocol specification
